# Role Responsibility Template

Use this template to document role assignments for a project. Copy one block per role involved in the project and fill in the fields. Reference the [Personas & Roles document](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) for role definitions and RACI guidance.

---

## Project Name: _[Project Name]_

**Date:** _YYYY-MM-DD_
**Prepared by:** _[Your Name]_

---

## Role Assignment

### Role: _[e.g., QA Engineer]_

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Role** | _[Role name — see Personas doc]_ |
| **Assigned To** | _[Full name or team name]_ |
| **RACI Tag** | _R / A / C / I_ |
| **Contacts** | _[Email, Slack handle, or on-call rotation]_ |

**Responsibilities** _(for this project)_:
- _Responsibility 1_
- _Responsibility 2_
- _Responsibility 3_

**Key Deliverables**:
- _Deliverable 1 — due [date or milestone]_
- _Deliverable 2 — due [date or milestone]_

**Handoff Notes**:
_Describe what this role hands off, to whom, and when. Include any blockers or dependencies the receiving role should know about._

---

<!-- Repeat the block above for each role involved in the project -->

## Role Assignment

### Role: _[e.g., Release Manager]_

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Role** | _[Role name — see Personas doc]_ |
| **Assigned To** | _[Full name or team name]_ |
| **RACI Tag** | _R / A / C / I_ |
| **Contacts** | _[Email, Slack handle, or on-call rotation]_ |

**Responsibilities** _(for this project)_:
- _Responsibility 1_
- _Responsibility 2_
- _Responsibility 3_

**Key Deliverables**:
- _Deliverable 1 — due [date or milestone]_
- _Deliverable 2 — due [date or milestone]_

**Handoff Notes**:
_Describe what this role hands off, to whom, and when. Include any blockers or dependencies the receiving role should know about._

---

## Summary RACI Table

Use the table below to capture all roles in one view for quick reference.

| Activity / Deliverable | PdM | Dev | QA | PM | UX | DA | Release Mgr | DevOps | Sec | Accessibility |
|------------------------|-----|-----|----|----|----|----|-------------|--------|-----|---------------|
| _[Activity 1]_         |     |     |    |    |    |    |             |        |     |               |
| _[Activity 2]_         |     |     |    |    |    |    |             |        |     |               |
| _[Activity 3]_         |     |     |    |    |    |    |             |        |     |               |

_Fill each cell with R, A, C, or I. Each activity should have exactly one A (Accountable)._
